response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile senior engineer with roughly 15 years of full-stack experience, genuine scale exposure (low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second at Sociomantic), and current AI-tooling work that matches a preferred qualification. However, the role is a Principal/IC6 position centered on experimentation systems, and his resume shows no experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis — the core of this job. There is also little evidence of principal-level scope such as leading multi-workstream initiatives across teams; his trajectory is strong senior IC work at small-to-mid-size companies.
strengths: High-scale production experience: low-latency, async microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work, matching the AI-velocity preferred qualification
Broad engineering craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) plus mentoring via workshops and courses
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience anywhere on the resume
No demonstrated principal-level scope — no cross-team architecture ownership or multi-workstream initiatives at enterprise scale
Weak signal on data/statistics aptitude required for metrics, guardrails, and experimental analysis work

key_factors.factor: Below principal-level scope and leadership evidence
